comments: This JSON object is written to the db on initial cold startup with an empty database
A new version is written each time the 'mdcManagement' section is updated.
The version number must be increased, the id must be assigned a new GUID, and the lastFileUpdateDateTime updated a new version is made
The resource reference for this object in the database is <namespace><id>, e.g., http://teragator.com/ns/management/objects/mdcstartup#34C890F9-9900-4C1E-9B58-B9BB99B6298A
A configuration specifies the domains enabled for the application
A domain specifies the namespace, data objects, initialisation, query objects, ETL, and other run-time behaviour for an application
The 'restart' section is appended with new information each time the software is started
2025-04-29 version 10.  Modified V2 SKOS queries for V2 API
